text.content:
Tab                     Edit Mode 전환
E                       Extrude
Ctrl + R                Loop Cut
I                       Inset
Ctrl + B                Bevel
Ctrl + 1 / 2 / 3        Subdivision 레벨 빠른 변경
Shift + E               Edge Crease
Ctrl + A                All Transforms 적용
P                       Separate
Ctrl + J                Join
S + X + 0 + Enter       Mirror 중심선 정렬
